AI Competency Framework v1.0 · HQ Appraisal

AI Maturity Appraisal Admin

Every Eduversal partner school self-assesses its AI maturity each year. This queue lists submissions. Open any school to compare the school's self-rating against the evidence, adjust the validated level if needed, and write Eduversal-level recommendations.
